session_detail: RACE DAY. 10K at your 3:1 ratio (run 3 min / walk 1 min) from the start. Begin slower than feels necessary. Take every scheduled walk break, even when you feel good.
coaching_focus: Hold the ratio from the gun. Start slow, finish strong, enjoy it.
